offer: For medical billing specialists processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient manual billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing submissions instead of manual data entry into billing systems.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on billing workflows
DM outreach to medical billing specialists with demo video
Participate in forums for sharing billing tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry support on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
